title: DimWorldBorder
description: Manage worldborders per-dimension, rather than per-world!
body:
### **As of Minecraft 1.21.9, the DimWorldBorder mod is obsolete, as the functionality for independently configuring world borders for each dimension will be added to the base game!**

**DimWorldBorder** is a mod for Minecraft 1.21 on NeoForge/Fabric, enabling server administrators to customize world borders independently for each dimension (Overworld, Nether, End, and others).
  
**Server-side only; no client installation required.**  
  
**Command System**  
The /dimworldborder (or /dwb) command allows:  
Set border size: /dimworldborder <dimension> set <size> [time]  
Expand/shrink border: /dimworldborder <dimension> add <distance> [time]  
Set border center: /dimworldborder <dimension> center <x> <z>  
Adjust damage: /dimworldborder <dimension> damage amount <value> or /dimworldborder <dimension> damage buffer <value>  
Configure warnings: /dimworldborder <dimension> warning distance <blocks> or /dimworldborder <dimension> warning time <seconds>  
View border size: /dimworldborder <dimension> get  
  
**Getting Started**  
Install the mod on a NeoForge/Fabric server (Minecraft 1.21)  
For details, type /dimworldborder in-game  
Configure borders for each dimension
